questions.text: When the AI answer is nearly useful, what do you do next?

answers.text: Paste more context and hope that unlocks it.
Copy the best bit and keep moving.
Start over with a totally new angle.

questions.text: Before starting a new AI task, what do you usually use?

answers.text: An old prompt I vaguely remember working.
A heroic pile of docs, notes, and links.
Whatever sentence comes to mind first.
A quick prompt, then I tidy the result later.

questions.text: What makes an AI answer feel ready to use?

answers.text: I have checked the facts, logic, and tone.
It sounds polished and oddly persuasive.
It is the best of several regenerated versions.
It looks good enough to copy-paste onward.
